channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, April 16 (game #1040)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Thursday, April 16 (game #1543)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, April 16 (game #774)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: ‘Avatar: Aang, The Last Airbender’ Leaked Online. Some Fans Say Paramount Deserves the Fallout
item.description: After the full movie leaked, animators mourned the chance to release their work as intended. Others feel the leak is justified in light of Paramount’s marketing blunders and association with Trump.

item.title: Amazon-backed X-energy files to raise up to $800M in IPO
item.description: Nuclear startup X-energy hit the road today to sell prospective investors on its initial public offering.

item.title: Is this the tipping point for AI at work? New Gallup survey finds half of all US employees now use it in some way
item.description: New Gallup data claims AI usage is at an all-time high, with productivity gains the main boost.

item.title: I have an Allbirds collection that I love, and its AI pivot feels worse than poorly-fitting shoes
item.description: Online shoe and apparel company Allbirds nearly went bankrupt, but now it's reemerging as an AI company that will sell you some GPU space. But what's really going on here?

item.title: YouTube now lets you turn off Shorts
item.description: YouTube's time management settings now have an option to put a zero-minute time limit on Shorts, effectively removing them from your app in Android and iOS. The option is an update to the Shorts timer YouTube originally announced in October; the lowest previous option was 15 minutes. The feature was expanded in January to give […]

item.title: The First ‘Clayface’ Footage Was Wonderfully Disgusting
item.description: Tom Rhys Harries stars as the Batman villain in the new film arriving October 23.

item.title: I used ChatGPT to envision my kid’s doodles as real animals, and they looked surprisingly lifelike
item.description: ChatGPT can make a child’s rough animal drawings into photorealistic creatures without altering them.

item.title: Lego unveils a new Star Wars build of The Mandalorians N-1 Starfighter, arriving May the 4th for $250 Lego is dropping a new Star Wars build of The Mandalorians N-1 Starfighter on May the 4th
item.description: Lego has announced the Star Wars The Mandalorian’s N-1 Starfighter set, its newest Ultimate Collector Series build. It arrives on May the 4th.

item.title: Learn piano for less than $24 a year with this AI-powered piano tutoring app
item.description: Learn piano on your own time with this three-year subscription to flowkey Piano Learning App Classic Plan.

item.title: This Microsoft Office deal cuts out the monthly bill for $100
item.description: Get Microsoft Office 2024 Home & Business for $99.97 (reg. $249.99) with a lifetime license, including Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and OneNote without a subscription.

item.title: This 100TB cloud plan might outlive your monthly subscription habit
item.description: Get 100TB of Internxt cloud storage for $974.47 with a lifetime plan, offering long-term storage without recurring monthly fees.

item.title: Microsoft's new college deal is a half-hearted answer to the $500 MacBook Neo
item.description: Apple's MacBook Neo is a $600 (or $500 for students) shot across the bow at affordable Windows laptops, and it seems like Microsoft has ready its first response. The newly announced "Microsoft College Offer" is a bundle of Microsoft 365 Premium, Xbox Game Pass Ultimate, custom Xbox controller and discounted laptop that the company thinks could woo students away from Apple's new deal. With the purchase of a discounted machine directly from Microsoft, retailers like Amazon and Best Buy or PC makers like HP, ASUS and Acer, you can get what the company says is an extra $500 of value from its bundl...

item.title: Ford EV and tech chief leaving automaker
item.description: Doug Field had stints at Apple and Tesla before joining Ford in 2021.
